query: UPDATE atis_boards SET isArchived = 1 WHERE name = 'Go To Market Strategy Template' AND id = (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM atis_boards WHERE name = 'Go To Market Strategy Template' ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 1) as subq);
